modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty splitting merged cells in Excel.

full_description_text:  
So, I was just trying to work on this Excel sheet, you know, the one with all the data for our project. I had some cells that were merged together, and I thought it would be super easy to just split them apart. But for some reason, I couldn't figure out how to do it! It’s like the option just vanished or something, and I really need to get this sorted out to move forward with my work.
